title: Trussflow Agent Status Envelope
description: Mechanical status returned by the orchestration wrapper after an agent dispatch. Verified before a continue/repair/abort decision is made.

agent.description: Name of the agent that produced the result.

schema.description: Name of the JSON schema the agent payload was validated against.

ok.description: True when the agent payload parsed and validated successfully.

item_count.description: Number of primary items the agent produced (requirements, grades, etc.).

validated.description: True when the payload passed JSON-schema validation.

error.description: Error message when ok is false; null otherwise.
